b524_row_identity.round_trip_stability: namespace keys and persisted topology must be preserved without sentinel rewrite

artifact_contract.topology_authority: persisted groups[*].dual_namespace and groups[*].namespaces are authoritative for consumers

constraint_scope.rationale: The bundled static catalog is seeded from opcode-0x01 probe evidence, but it is only applied to opcode 0x02 by default. Remote opcode 0x06 requires explicit scope or live confirmation.
